name: Chicken Breasts with Bacon
recipeIngredient: 2 Bunches of green onions (chopped include some green)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the cheese and chopped onions; form into 12 walnut-sized balls.
2. Wrap half a chicken breast around each ball, and one or two slices of bacon around that, covering as much of the chicken as possible.
3. Secure each bundle with a toothpick or two.
4. Place on a rack, with a drip pan underneath, about 6 to 8 inches from the broiler unit.
5. Turn occasionally, as they brown, and broil for about 30 minutes, or until the bacon is done.
